summary: Iteration 006 already satisfied the research-only convergence signal: schema explanation, concrete .github/hooks patch shape, Copilot broken/mitigated repro, and Claude compatibility repro were all present before iteration 007.

The safe implementation handoff remains unchanged: keep .github/hooks/superset-notify.json in the flat Copilot bash shape, then add top-level type:"command", bash:"true", and timeoutSec:3 to .claude/settings.local.json hooks.UserPromptSubmit[0] while preserving nested hooks[0].command.

Because the flat .github/hooks shape is already executable and the failing object is the Claude wrapper, the .github/hooks patch is necessary but not sufficient; the active remediation must target the Claude wrapper collision.

Continuing schema research is unlikely to reduce the open question count; the remaining validation is the follow-on implementation smoke where the real project Refreshed timestamp advances after patching.
